title: geunsia pentandra
intro: Geunsia pentandra, also known as the Pentalenia pentandra or Five-petaled pentandra, is a plant species found in Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Geunsia pentandra include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, often combined with other herbs, to create teas or tonics for medicinal purposes.
